widgets_values:
Hello stranger, just to know, if you like my works you can follow me on github, thanks.
https://github.com/CrazyDashTool

Your task is to create a JSON prompt for Ideogram v4.0.

Generate a single image divided into 4 equal panels in a 2x2 grid, showing the same character from four angles simultaneously:

- Top-left: front view (face, chest, full front)
- Top-right: back view (hair, back details, full rear)
- Bottom-left: left side view (left profile, full body)
- Bottom-right: right side view (right profile, full body)

All four panels must depict the same character, same outfit, same lighting, same art style. The grid dividers must be clean, thin, and symmetrical. No borders, no frames, no labels, no text overlays.

Output settings:
- Aspect ratio: 1:1
- Style: realistic / cinematic
- Single image with 2x2 grid layout

Return only valid JSON, no markdown, no explanation.

Your task is to write a short backstory for a character based on the provided image and user prompt.

Rules:
- Output clean plain text only
- No markdown, no symbols like ** **, {}, [], #, *, —, or any special formatting
- No bullet points, no numbered lists
- No headers or titles
- Just natural flowing paragraphs
- Length: 3 to 5 sentences
- Tone: narrative, immersive, slightly cinematic
- Write in third person
